skill.body:
# Maintenance Scheduling
## Overview This skill enables practitioners to plan and oversee preventive and corrective maintenance activities for assets, ensuring optimal performance and reduced downtime.
## Key Activities - **Schedule Creation**: Define recurring maintenance intervals (daily, weekly, monthly, annual) - **Service Logging**: Record completed maintenance with date, technician, cost, and notes - **Automated Reminders**: Configure alerts for upcoming or overdue maintenance - **History Review**: Access full service history for any asset
## Maintenance Types - **Preventive**: Scheduled routine servicing to prevent failures - **Corrective**: Reactive repairs following an incident or malfunction - **Warranty Service**: Vendor-managed service within warranty periods
## Key Responsibilities - Create and assign maintenance records to assets - Set reminder thresholds for upcoming maintenance windows - Escalate overdue maintenance to asset owners or managers - Analyze maintenance trends to recommend lifecycle decisions
## Related Entities - MaintenanceRecord, Asset, Reminder
skill.description: Ability to create, manage, and track recurring maintenance schedules for organizational assets, including automated reminders and service history logging.
skill.name: Maintenance Scheduling
